principles: Copy-paste ownership: components are copied into your project via CLI, not imported from npm — you own the source
Radix UI primitives provide accessible behavior; shadcn adds Tailwind styling on top
Tailwind CSS v4 + CSS custom properties (oklch) for all design tokens
cn() utility (clsx + tailwind-merge) for conditional className composition
data-slot attributes on every component enable precise CSS targeting without hacks
Dark mode via next-themes ThemeProvider with attribute='class' — toggled by adding 'dark' class to <html>
layout_grids: Tailwind CSS grid and flex utilities — no grid system built-in
Sidebar component for app shell layouts
design_principles.brand_constraints: Design tokens defined as CSS custom properties in globals.css; swap themes by changing token values
do: Run `npx shadcn@latest add <component>` to copy component into components/ui/
Import components from '@/components/ui/<name>' (path alias required in tsconfig)
Use cn() from '@/lib/utils' for conditional className merging
Wrap app with ThemeProvider from next-themes for dark mode support
Use the Form component (react-hook-form wrapper) for accessible form validation
dont: Don't import from an npm package — shadcn components are local files in your project
Don't modify Radix primitives directly — wrap or extend via className and data-slot targeting
Don't skip the cn() utility — raw className concatenation breaks Tailwind deduplication
Don't forget to configure path alias '@' in tsconfig.json pointing to './src' or '.'

</Dialog>

behaviors.result: FormMessage shows error; FormLabel turns destructive; aria-invalid set on control

examples.title: Form with Validation
examples.code:
import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form'
import { Form, FormControl, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormMessage } from '@/components/ui/form'
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'

const form = useForm({ defaultValues: { username: '' } })

<Form {...form}>
  <form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)}>
    <FormField control={form.control} name="username" render={({ field }) => (
      <FormItem>
        <FormLabel>Username</FormLabel>
        <FormControl><Input placeholder="Enter username" {...field} /></FormControl>
        <FormMessage />
      </FormItem>
    )} />
    <Button type="submit">Submit</Button>
  </form>
</Form>

patterns.name: Command-in-Popover (Combobox pattern)
patterns.description: Combine Popover + Command to build an accessible combobox with filtering

patterns.name: Form with react-hook-form
patterns.description: Form + FormField + FormControl wraps any shadcn input with validation and accessible error messages

patterns.name: Data Table
patterns.description: Table with TanStack Table for sorting, filtering, pagination. shadcn Table provides HTML structure; TanStack provides logic

patterns.name: Sheet Navigation Drawer
patterns.description: Sheet component used as mobile navigation sidebar that slides in from left

app_shell.recommended_structure: Wrap app root with ThemeProvider (from next-themes, shadcn wraps it with attribute='class', defaultTheme='system', enableSystem). Add <Toaster /> at root for toast notifications. Components live in components/ui/ as copied source files, imported via @/components/ui/<name> path alias. Configure @/lib/utils.ts with cn() (clsx + tailwind-merge). Add tailwind.config.ts and globals.css with CSS custom property tokens.

capabilities: 25+ production-quality UI components with accessible Radix UI primitives
Full Tailwind CSS v4 styling with CSS custom property (oklch) design tokens
Dark mode via next-themes ThemeProvider with class-based toggling
Form management via react-hook-form integration (Form component)
Command palette / combobox pattern via cmdk
Compound component patterns — named re-exports from Radix (e.g. Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent)
Type-safe variant props via class-variance-authority (CVA) and buttonVariants, badgeVariants
Composable layouts — Tailwind flex/grid utilities, Sidebar component for app shells
Copy-paste ownership model — no npm runtime dependency, components are local source files
Full keyboard navigation and ARIA roles inherited from Radix UI primitives
WCAG 2.1 AA compliant baseline via Radix accessibility layer
Polymorphic rendering via asChild prop (Radix Slot.Root)
data-slot attributes on all components for precise CSS targeting
gaps: No built-in date picker — use react-day-picker (shadcn provides Calendar component built on it, but no DatePicker combination out of the box)
No data grid / virtual scroll — use TanStack Table (shadcn Table is HTML-only, no sorting/pagination built-in)
No chart components built-in — use Recharts (shadcn Chart component is a thin Recharts wrapper)
No rich text editor — use Tiptap or Lexical
No file upload with preview — build custom or use react-dropzone
No layout primitives (Box, Stack, Grid) — use Tailwind utility classes directly
No color palette prop (unlike Chakra UI) — colors are baked into CSS custom properties and Tailwind config; customization requires editing globals.css or tailwind.config.ts
No animation library built-in beyond tailwindcss-animate — use Framer Motion for complex animations
Not an npm importable package — components must be copied via CLI (npx shadcn@latest add <name>); this is intentional by design
No Image component — use Next.js Image or standard
No virtual select / multi-select — use react-select or cmdk with custom logic
Sidebar component requires specific layout structure and CSS variables for width/animation

missing: no size prop — size via className only
